scripts.build: payload migrate && payload generate:importmap && next build
scripts.migrate:prod: dotenvx run -f .env.production.local -- cross-env NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation payload migrate
scripts.seed:site:prod: dotenvx run -f .env.production.local -- cross-env NODE_ENV=production tsx src/scripts/seed-site-settings.ts
scripts.check:site:prod: dotenvx run -f .env.production.local -- cross-env NODE_ENV=production tsx src/scripts/check-site-settings.ts
scripts.fix:dev-marker:prod: dotenvx run -f .env.production.local -- cross-env NODE_ENV=production tsx src/scripts/clear-dev-marker.ts
scripts.seed:guides:prod: dotenvx run -f .env.production.local -- cross-env NODE_ENV=production tsx src/scripts/seed-guides.ts
